km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves是Sheriff John de Delves的兒子，於1220年出生在荷蘭武特雷特恩。他和Margaret Calveley至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves是Sheriff John de Delves的儿子，于1220年出生在荷兰武特雷特恩。他和Margaret Calveley至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves was born in 1220, in Eng, Utrecht, Netherlands as the son of Sheriff John de Delves. He had at least 1 son with Margaret Calveley. He died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves est né en 1220, à Eng, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, fils de Sheriff John de Delves. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret Calveley. Il est décédé à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves wurde 1220 in Eng, Utrecht, Niederlande, als Sohn von Sheriff John de Delves geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret Calveley mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves è nato il nel 1220 nel Eng, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Sheriff John de Delves. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret Calveley. Morì nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Delvesは1220年にオランダウトレチトエングでSheriff John de Delvesの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaret Calveleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves(은)는 1220년 네덜란드 우트레ch트 잉에서 Sheriff John de Delves의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Calveley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves nasceu em 1220, em Eng, Utrecht, Países Baixos filho de Sheriff John de Delves. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret Calveley. Ele faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves родился в 1220 г. в местности энг, утречт, Нидерланды. Его отца звали Sheriff John de Delves. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret Calveley. Он умер в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Delves nació en 1220, en Eng, Utrecht, Países Bajos como hijo de Sheriff John de Delves. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret Calveley. Murió en Inglaterra.
